title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Jindal Steel & Power

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Jindal Steel & Power
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Jindal Steel & Power in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Jindal Steel & Power:
Jindal Steel & Power is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jindal Steel & Power!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
